Results by Tier

Tier 1 - Easy: Current state queries. Tier 2 - Medium: Change history queries. Tier 3 - Hard: Intent queries. Tier 4 - Temporal: Cross-event time and order reasoning. Tier 5 - Adversarial: Questions with false premises that the agent must detect and correct.
